title: Employment Rights: An employee has the right to a safe working environment...
summary: Assess whether employers must provide a safe working environment under CCQ 2087.
prompt: An employee has the right to a safe working environment as per CCQ 2087.
solution: According to CCQ 2087, employers are obliged to provide their employees with a safe working environment, both physically and morally. This includes ensuring cleanliness, safety measures, and a workplace free from harassment or intimidation.
